programme.title: Above the Spanish Islands
programme.desc: Sweeping viewers on an aerial voyage over Mallorca and the Canary Islands.

programme.title: Flying Over Big Sur
programme.desc: Soar over California's Big Sur for an hour of relaxation with Big Sur From Above, Nature Relaxation's 2019 drone film; see iconic sites like McWay Falls and Bixby Bridge from an aerial view.

programme.title: Peaceful Forest Walk: Quebec
programme.desc: The heart of the Laurentians.

programme.title: Cascading waterfall: Indonesia
programme.desc: Take a trip through the Indonesian jungle to a remote waterfall cascading over a natural cave.

programme.title: Turtle Paradise
programme.desc: Dive into an undersea world inhabited by the sea turtles; featuring real-time video scenes captured from around the Caribbean, paired with gentle underwater sounds and calming music for relaxation.

programme.title: Hollyford Track: New Zealand
programme.desc: A remote beech forest full of diverse vegetation, waterfalls and rocky streams.

programme.title: Date With Nature
programme.desc: Slip away to Thailand's secluded shores and hidden streams, where aquatic life glides through crystal-clear waters.

programme.title: Helicopter Island: Philippines
programme.desc: Having a beach day on a unique island shaped like a helicopter; taking in the crystal clear waters, white sand, and lush greenery.

programme.title: The Cliff: Costa Rica
programme.desc: Turquoise waters and blue skies as far as the eye can see viewed from atop a cliff.

programme.title: Kapas Biru Waterfall: Indonesia
programme.desc: Escape to Indonesia with tropical vegetation and a rushing waterfall.

programme.title: Rainbow Reef Relaxation 2
programme.desc: Vibrant underwater reefs, including many scenes which no longer look as depicted due to coral bleaching.

programme.title: Flying Over the Atlantic Ocean
programme.desc: Travelling the coasts of the Atlantic Ocean from a bird's-eye view.

programme.title: Hamurana Springs
programme.desc: A nature reserve on North Island.

programme.title: Morning Sun on Yosemite Falls
programme.desc: The morning sunlight slowly casts its golden light onto the majestic Upper Yosemite Falls, with this 4K ultra-high definition real-time nature video featuring stereo sounds captured along the falls trail.

programme.title: Flying Over Scotland
programme.desc: Soaring over the lush green landscape and enchanting waters of Scotland in a bird's-eye view voyage.

programme.title: Golden Waves Crashing at Sunset
programme.desc: The shores of the iconic Baker Beach in San Francisco with a sunset scene filmed in high definition. Views of the Marin headlands and the Golden Gate Bridge.

programme.title: Crystal Waterfalls of Croatia
programme.desc: The Plitvice Lakes National Park.

programme.title: Bayahibe Pier: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Taking a break on the idyllic Bayahibe Pier in the Dominican Republic to enjoy its hushed seaside and turquoise waters.

programme.title: Lost in Paradise
programme.desc: A tropical island paradise to relax in. A one-hour-long high definition nature experience of two different remote islands hidden in the south Pacific.

programme.title: Healing Hawaii II: Oahu
programme.desc: The wonders of Oahu.

programme.title: Wharariki Beach I: New Zealand
programme.desc: Exploring the sandy shores and rocky cliffs of a majestic beach in New Zealand.

programme.title: Return to Paradise 2
programme.desc: Escaping to one of the world's most idyllic tropical islands on the beaches of Fiji.

programme.title: Sunrise Meditation
programme.desc: Easing into the day with the sound of lapping waves and breathtaking beaches from around the world.

programme.title: Lake Tahoe Shoreline Rocks
programme.desc: The shoreline of Lake Tahoe.

programme.title: Fly Over the French Alps
programme.desc: Fly Over the French Alps.

programme.title: Flying Over Greece
programme.desc: Journey through the landscapes of Greece from a bird's-eye-view.

programme.title: The Soothing Sun
programme.desc: Rejoice and relax in the splendor of the glorious Sun for a full hour, with this new video by David Huting.

programme.title: Enchanting Gorge: Finger Lakes -- Finger Lakes, New York
programme.desc: Find your inner peace admiring a waterfall cascading into a gorge in New York's Finger Lakes region.

programme.title: Tropical Weightlessness
programme.desc: Gently sway in the tropical turquoise waters with a glimpse of blue sky and palm trees.

programme.title: Inambakan Falls: Philippines
programme.desc: Scenes of cascading falls and a pool reminiscent of blue gems, then a glimpse of the surrounding jungle greens.

programme.title: A Day in Mt Rainier 1
programme.desc: Journeying to hidden sections of Mount Rainier National Park in Washington state with pure nature sounds for relaxation.

programme.title: Hawaii Beaches: Oahu 2
programme.desc: Escaping to the sandy solitudes of Hawaii's tropical beaches.

programme.title: Tiny House by the Coast: Îles de la Madeleine
programme.desc: The filmmaker captures the beauty of a tiny lone house on Îles de la Madeleine, Quebec; the filmmaker illuminates the serenity and pristine environment of the region they belong to.

programme.title: Lakeside Campfire: Quebec
programme.desc: Listening to the elegance and warmth of the crackling fire in Entrelacs, Quebec.

programme.title: Underwater Wonders
programme.desc: Highlighting the abundant and varied flora and fauna that dwells underwater in several oceans around the world.

programme.title: New Zealand Gardens
programme.desc: The filmmaker explores the breathtaking gardens of New Zealand and provides the diversity and beauty of these enchanting havens.

programme.title: Karamea National Park: New Zealand
programme.desc: Quiet beaches, mysterious caves, and rainforested hills of this secluded haven.

programme.title: Nature's Beauty: World of Relaxation
programme.desc: Scenes from over 100 different exotic, natural destinations around the world; a seamless, graciously flowing mix of several Nature Relaxation shorter length productions, designed to keep you in a state of complete relaxation from start to finish; transitioning you from golden sunsets to snowy mountaintops; from hidden canyon waterfalls to tropical islands so pure you've likely never seen anything like it.

programme.title: Above the Fiji Islands
programme.desc: Featuring aerial views of remote South Pacific islands, accompanied by nature sounds and ambient music by Relax Moods; offering a mix of ground-level and bird's-eye perspectives through smooth, continuous shots, concluding with a real-time sunset over the sea.

programme.title: Atuh Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Take a tour of beautiful Indonesian waters, surrounded by impressive rock formations.

programme.title: Breathtaking Waterfalls: Philippines
programme.desc: A tour of waterfalls.

programme.title: Rugged Beach: Hawaii
programme.desc: A new day dawns on Hawaii's Pa'ako beach as waves crash on the shore and the sky brightens with gorgeous hues.

programme.title: Lover's Island & Entalula Beach
programme.desc: Powder-white beaches and shimmering waters.

programme.title: Lombok Beaches: Indonesia
programme.desc: Experiencing the beaches of an Indonesian island set to a peaceful soundtrack.

programme.title: White Beach: Philippines
programme.desc: Lazing the day away on a white sand beach in the Philippines as the sun gently sets on the horizon.

programme.title: Shimizu Island: Philippines
programme.desc: Relax to the serene beauty of the turquoise waters that surround the rocky coast of Shimizu Island in the Philippines.

programme.title: Tutoko River: New Zealand
programme.desc: Rushing waters through rocky rapids.

programme.title: Lush Vineyards: Portugal
programme.desc: The jaw-droppingly beautiful Douro Valley, Portugal's most scenic wine regions.

programme.title: Flying Over South Korea
programme.desc: The filmmaker showcases South Korea's natural wonders and urban landscapes by exploring four of the country's most famous destinations: Jeju Island, Seoul, Geoje National Park and Busan.

programme.title: Above & Under
programme.desc: Flying above beachy shores; diving deep into crystal-clear waters brimming with sea creatures.

programme.title: Ulun Danu Temple: Indonesia
programme.desc: Feel the tranquility of an ancient temple and the serene views of its surrounding waters.
